final:
module tcp_segment_type (
    input [31:0] segment,
    output [15:0] segment_type
);
    assign segment_type = (segment[2:0] == 3'b000) ? 16'd0 : // Data
                          (segment[2:0] == 3'b001) ? 16'd1 : // SYN
                          (segment[2:0] == 3'b010) ? 16'd2 : // ACK
                          (segment[2:0] == 3'b011) ? 16'd3 : // FIN
                          (segment[2:0] == 3'b100) ? 16'd4 : // RST
                          16'd0; // Default to Data
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (segment[2:0] == 3'b000) begin
        segment_type <= 16'd4;
      end else if (segment[2:0] == 3'b001) begin
        segment_type <= 16'd3;
      end else if (segment[2:0] == 3'b010) begin
        segment_type <= 16'd2;
      end else if (segment[2:0] == 3'b011) begin
        segment_type <= 16'd1;
      end else if (segment[2:0] == 3'b100) begin
        segment_type <= 16'd0;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
